languages.text: "Сердце мое исполнено скорби, Лорд-капитан. Нет для меня муки горше, чем стоять в бою по другую сторону от своих сестер. Лишь вера в то, что все это — ложное и нечестивое наваждение, укрепляет мой дух".

traits.locale_text: "Сердце мое исполнено скорби, Лорд-капитан. Нет для меня муки горше, чем стоять в бою по другую сторону от своих сестер. Лишь вера в то, что все это — ложное и нечестивое наваждение, укрепляет мой дух".

languages.text: "My heart is heavy with sorrow, Lord Captain. There is no greater torment than to stand opposing my own sisters in battle. Only my faith that all this is a false and unholy apparition strengthens my spirit."
languages.original_text: "Сердце мое исполнено скорби, Лорд-капитан. Нет для меня муки горше, чем стоять в бою по другую сторону от своих сестер. Лишь вера в то, что все это — ложное и нечестивое наваждение, укрепляет мой дух".

traits.locale_text: "My heart is heavy with sorrow, Lord Captain. There is no greater torment than to stand opposing my own sisters in battle. Only my faith that all this is a false and unholy apparition strengthens my spirit."

"My heart is heavy with sorrow, Lord Captain. There is no greater torment than to stand opposing my own sisters in battle. Only my faith that all this is a false and unholy apparition strengthens my spirit."

"My heart is heavy with sorrow, Lord Captain. There is no greater torment than to stand opposing my own sisters in battle. Only my faith that all this is a false and unholy apparition strengthens my spirit."

languages.text: “我的内心无比沉重，舰长大人。与自己的姐妹兵戎相见，世上再无比这更残酷的折磨。唯有坚信这一切不过是虚妄不洁的幻象，才能支撑我的心神。”
languages.original_text: "My heart is heavy with sorrow, Lord Captain. There is no greater torment than to stand opposing my own sisters in battle. Only my faith that all this is a false and unholy apparition strengthens my spirit."

traits.locale_text: “我的内心无比沉重，舰长大人。与自己的姐妹兵戎相见，世上再无比这更残酷的折磨。唯有坚信这一切不过是虚妄不洁的幻象，才能支撑我的心神。”

languages.text: « Mon cœur est lourd de chagrin, {mf|seigneur-capitaine|seigneure-capitaine}. Il n'y a pas de pire tourment que de devoir m'opposer à mes propres sœurs dans la foi. Seule ma conviction qu'il s'agit d'une apparition trompeuse et impie me conforte dans ma décision. »
languages.original_text: "My heart is heavy with sorrow, Lord Captain. There is no greater torment than to stand opposing my own sisters in battle. Only my faith that all this is a false and unholy apparition strengthens my spirit."

traits.locale_text: « Mon cœur est lourd de chagrin, {mf|seigneur-capitaine|seigneure-capitaine}. Il n'y a pas de pire tourment que de devoir m'opposer à mes propres sœurs dans la foi. Seule ma conviction qu'il s'agit d'une apparition trompeuse et impie me conforte dans ma décision. »

languages.text: "Kalbim kedere boğuldu Lord Kaptan. Harpte rahibelere karşı durmaktan daha büyük bir azap yoktur. Gelgelelim tüm bunların sahte ve kutsal olmayan bir görüntü olduğuna olan inancım, ruhumu güçlendiriyor."
languages.original_text: "My heart is heavy with sorrow, Lord Captain. There is no greater torment than to stand opposing my own sisters in battle. Only my faith that all this is a false and unholy apparition strengthens my spirit."

traits.locale_text: "Kalbim kedere boğuldu Lord Kaptan. Harpte rahibelere karşı durmaktan daha büyük bir azap yoktur. Gelgelelim tüm bunların sahte ve kutsal olmayan bir görüntü olduğuna olan inancım, ruhumu güçlendiriyor."

languages.text: «Mi corazón está cargado de pesar, Lord Capitán. No hay mayor tormento que enfrentarme a mis hermanas en batalla. Tan solo mi fe en que esto es una aparición falsa e impía da fuerzas a mi espíritu».
languages.original_text: "My heart is heavy with sorrow, Lord Captain. There is no greater torment than to stand opposing my own sisters in battle. Only my faith that all this is a false and unholy apparition strengthens my spirit."

traits.locale_text: «Mi corazón está cargado de pesar, Lord Capitán. No hay mayor tormento que enfrentarme a mis hermanas en batalla. Tan solo mi fe en que esto es una aparición falsa e impía da fuerzas a mi espíritu».

languages.text: "Mein Herz ist erfüllt von Trauer und Schmerz, Lord Captain. Es gibt keine größere Qual, als meinen eigenen Schwestern in der Schlacht gegenüber zu stehen. Allein mein Glaube, dass all das eine falsche und unheilige Erscheinung ist, stärkt meinen Geist."
languages.original_text: "My heart is heavy with sorrow, Lord Captain. There is no greater torment than to stand opposing my own sisters in battle. Only my faith that all this is a false and unholy apparition strengthens my spirit."

traits.locale_text: "Mein Herz ist erfüllt von Trauer und Schmerz, Lord Captain. Es gibt keine größere Qual, als meinen eigenen Schwestern in der Schlacht gegenüber zu stehen. Allein mein Glaube, dass all das eine falsche und unheilige Erscheinung ist, stärkt meinen Geist."

languages.text: 「我が心は悲しみに沈み、艦長様。己の姉妹と戦場を共にし、敵として立つ苦悩は、他に比類ないもの。この全てが虚しく不浄な幻影であるという信仰が、我が心を支えている。」
languages.original_text: "My heart is heavy with sorrow, Lord Captain. There is no greater torment than to stand opposing my own sisters in battle. Only my faith that all this is a false and unholy apparition strengthens my spirit."

traits.locale_text: 「我が心は悲しみに沈み、艦長様。己の姉妹と戦場を共にし、敵として立つ苦悩は、他に比類ないもの。この全てが虚しく不浄な幻影であるという信仰が、我が心を支えている。」
